steps.title: Recognize the exponential growth pattern
steps.content:
When $x$ increases by 1, $y$ is multiplied by 3. This describes exponential growth with base 3.

For this problem, $b = 3$ (the growth factor) and $a = 200$ (the initial value when $x = 0$).

steps.title: Determine and verify the equation
steps.content:
Substituting the values into the exponential form gives: $$y = 200(3)^x$$
Verification: when $x = 0$, $$y = 200(3)^0 = 200$$ ✓; when $x = 1$, $$y = 200(3)^1 = 600$$, which is exactly $200 \times 3$ ✓.
This matches choice B — B is correct.
